creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
* 	apply diff -ruN below to the AS-1.0 port, patch is kinda 
 * 	long as things are significantly different than 1.0

as-1.0 is repository copied to x11/afterstep144, so whoever is going
to commit this, please update that one instead.  (The only difference
is the BROKEN line.)

Satoshi
